heading: Enterprise People Analytics Platform Backend
desc: Built and maintained backend systems for a multi-tenant people analytics platform, including survey creation, participant management, response processing, email delivery, AI-powered insights, audit logging, and organization-scoped data access. Integrated PostgreSQL, Redis queues, Neo4j graph analysis, Mailgun, OpenAI/LangChain, and external HRIS data sources.

heading: Survey Automation and Response Processing API
desc: Developed backend workflows for creating, publishing, testing, and tracking organizational surveys. Implemented participant upload flows, localized survey delivery, test survey handling, QR/link generation support, response validation, completion metrics, and reliable email delivery through Mailgun.

heading: Passive ONA Data Pipeline
desc: Built backend data processing pipelines for passive organizational network analysis, including Microsoft Graph/Entra ID ingestion, Redis-backed jobs, audit-safe processing, graph enrichment, and Neo4j-powered network analysis for collaboration and influence insights.

heading: AI Insights and Cogni Assistant Backend
desc: Implemented AI-assisted analytics features using OpenAI and LangChain to generate survey/report insights, translate survey content, and support Cogni chatbot workflows over organizational network data while preserving structured backend validation and tenant-scoped access.

heading: Blockchain Creator
desc: Proof of work consensus mechanism. Established network topology to facilitate communication between nodes. Defined numbers and roles of nodes in the network (miners & validators); generated first block.

heading: Grocery Store DB Migration and Integration Project
desc: Performed advanced PostgreSQL DB migrations using Flyway to ensure proper tracking of DB schema changes and versioning. Optimized using indexing techniques, as well as data structures such as linked lists, hash tables, stacks, and queues.

heading: MongoDB Post Storage System/REST API
desc: Blog post storage system using MERN stack. Offers a robust and scalable solution for managing and organizing blog content. Employed Mongoose (object modeling tool for MongoDB) to simplify data schema definition and facilitate interactions with the database.
